chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1335 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.5638/2023 3. For hearing of main case 28-02-2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.4 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition appears to be premature as in the light of comments of Provincial Assistant Registrar, Joint Stock Companies Hyderabad Region @ Hyderabad, it is established that tenure of the current body is valid up to 2024. Learned counsel submits that he has apprehension that in the upcoming Election the petitioner would not be allowed to contest the Election, however, he would be satisfied, if observation is made that in such event he would have a remedy to appear before the relevant court/forum for redressal of his grievance in accordance with law. The other side has no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
